resources.title: Contract Templates
resources.shortDescription: Standard international construction contract templates for cross-border projects.
resources.fullDescription: Professionally drafted contract templates covering FIDIC, NEC, and custom international agreements. Templates include clauses for payment terms, dispute resolution, force majeure, and liability limitations tailored for projects involving multiple jurisdictions.

resources.title: Contract Comparison Guide
resources.shortDescription: Side-by-side analysis of contracts from major construction markets worldwide.
resources.fullDescription: Comprehensive comparison of construction contract standards across 15+ major markets including US, UK, EU, Middle East, and Asia-Pacific regions. Highlights key differences in risk allocation, dispute resolution, and regulatory requirements.

resources.title: Country Legal Frameworks
resources.shortDescription: Overview of construction contract laws and regulations by country.
resources.fullDescription: Detailed legal framework summaries for 20+ countries covering statutory requirements, mandatory contract terms, enforcement mechanisms, and compliance considerations for international construction projects.

resources.title: Risk Management Checklist
resources.shortDescription: Essential checklist for identifying and mitigating contract risks.
resources.fullDescription: Interactive checklist covering financial risks, legal risks, operational risks, and political risks. Includes assessment criteria and mitigation strategies specific to cross-border construction contracts.

resources.title: Dispute Resolution Guide
resources.shortDescription: Comprehensive guide to arbitration, mediation, and litigation in construction.
resources.fullDescription: In-depth exploration of dispute resolution mechanisms including ICC, LCIA, and UNCITRAL arbitration rules. Covers procedural aspects, cost considerations, and strategic recommendations for international construction disputes.

resources.title: Best Practices White Paper
resources.shortDescription: Industry best practices for drafting and negotiating construction contracts.
resources.fullDescription: Research paper based on analysis of 500+ international construction contracts. Identifies best practices in clause drafting, negotiation strategies, and risk allocation techniques used by leading global contractors and developers.
